extraction_data.innovation: A dense decoder‑only Transformer scaled to 405 B parameters, the flagship model of the Llama 3.1 family, delivering multilingual, coding, reasoning, and tool‑use capabilities comparable to leading models such as GPT‑4.
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised finetuning (SFT) with rejection sampling and direct preference optimization for instruction following
extraction_data.extension: Minor adaptations to the standard dense Transformer architecture improve training stability at large scale
extraction_data.research_problem: Building high‑quality multilingual foundation language models with strong reasoning and tool‑use capabilities
extraction_data.application: Chat, instruction following, general language tasks, multilingual understanding, code generation, reasoning, tool usage

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a 4‑dimensional parallelism scheme (tensor, pipeline, data, and context parallelism) that enables training Llama 3 on sequences up to 128K tokens without activation checkpointing.
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine‑tuning (SFT) using synthetic, filtered, and multilingual data
extraction_data.extension: Cross‑attention layers using generalized query attention (GQA) and image/video adapters extend the base Llama 3 model for multimodal processing.
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient training of very large language models with long context windows.
extraction_data.application: code generation, code translation, documentation, debugging, multilingual instruction following, general language tasks
